text:
There was once an enchanted forest filled with shy rabbits. One sunny day, Snowdrop decided she wanted an adventurer's cloak. She fashioned one from leaves, woven together by the tiny birds.

Every morning, she would sneak outside with it draped around her awkward little neck. But her adventures were short-lived. On her first venture outside, a huge hawk swooped down!

With courage only a wee rabbit could muster, Snowdrop squeaked and darted away. Friends gathered round her tale—but she preferred her solitude.

Years passed, and Snowdrop did not grow bold. One day, she discovered a mysterious map. It led deep into the heart of an ancient oak. Though afraid, she took the plunge. Inside lay ancient secrets.

Every night, she dreamed of that oak.

One moonlit night, she climbed the gnarled trunk. It curved upwards into stars.

Inside whispered secrets...

From owl feathers, tiny glowing eyes popped out.

She woke trembling... Owlets? They spoke a secret
